description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden desk with a rich, dark brown finish and a rectangular tabletop. The front features two central drawers flanked by two cabinet doors, one of which is open to reveal interior shelving. The desk stands on four straight legs and includes a lower open shelf for additional storage or display. The cabinet doors have small round handles, and the left door has a visible glass or acrylic panel inset. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the desk a classic and sturdy appearance. The overall design is functional and suitable for both storage and workspace needs.
description: A dark brown wooden desk with drawers, cabinets, and a lower shelf, featuring visible wood grain and a classic, functional design.
description_view_0: The back of the desk is visible, showing a solid wood panel and the lower shelf, with no drawers or cabinet details apparent.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the desk's depth, the thickness of the tabletop, and the open left cabinet door with a glass or acrylic panel.
description_view_2: The front of the desk is shown, displaying two central drawers, two cabinet doors (one open), and interior shelving, as well as the lower open shelf.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, again showing the desk's depth and the open left cabinet door, with the right cabinet door partially open.
attribute_orientation: The side with drawers and cabinet doors is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front, while the solid panel is the back.
attribute_usage_context: writing desk or small office workstation
